description: Register a Firebase Admin SDK resource (Firestore + Cloud Storage + Realtime DB) for use by other components.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

project_id_env_var.label: Project ID Env Var
project_id_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Firebase project id.

credentials_path_env_var.label: Credentials Path Env Var
credentials_path_env_var.description: Env var holding a path to a service account JSON file. Mutually exclusive with credentials_json_env_var.

credentials_json_env_var.label: Credentials JSON Env Var
credentials_json_env_var.description: Env var holding the raw service account JSON. Mutually exclusive with credentials_path_env_var.

storage_bucket_env_var.label: Storage Bucket Env Var
storage_bucket_env_var.description: Optional env var holding the default Firebase Storage bucket name (e.g. '<project>.appspot.com').

database_url_env_var.label: Database URL Env Var
database_url_env_var.description: Optional env var holding the Realtime Database URL.

name: Firebase Resource
